standards_and_methodology: The total of neglected input flows per module is less than 5% of energy usage and mass as prescribed by EN15804+A2.
lca_software_and_database: For the calculation of the LCA results, the software program SimaPro 9.1.1 has been used. The Ecoinvent v3.6 database (2019) is used for background data
functional_unit: The declared unit in this EPD is 1 m2thermal insulation with a thickness of 80 mm which gives a RD-value of 3,80 m2·K/W. Kingspan Kooltherm® K12 can be produced in all thicknesses between 20 and 200mm (single layer product) and covers a RD range of 0.95 – 9.50. The results in this EPD can be used to recalculate to other thicknesses / RD-values. Where the foam-core is the scalable part and the facer the non-scalable part.

production_sites: The data used for the LCA are specific for this product which is manufactured by a single manufacturer in a single production site. Different types of Kooltherm® insulation boards are produced at the production plant in Tiel (NL). Manufacturer specific data for the location Tiel have been collected for the year 2019.
cut_off_criteria: The total of neglected input flows per module is less than 5% of energy usage and mass as prescribed by EN15804+A2. Following processes were excluded for the inventory: - Impact of infrastructures - Consumables necessary for the functioning of the process, production, maintenance and end-of-life of equipment - Environmental impacts caused by the personnel of the production plants are not included in the LCA, e.g. waste from the cafeteria and sanitary installations or environmental effects caused by commuter traffic. Heating or cooling of the plants in order to ensure a comfortable indoor climate for the personnel could not be distinguished during the data collection and is therefore included.
allocation: Different types of Kooltherm® insulation boards are produced at the production plant in Tiel (NL). For the use of energy there is only data available for the total site. This data has been allocated to Kooltherm® K12 based on physical properties. Production waste was allocated similarly.
data_quality: Company specific data for the product stage have been collected by Kingspan Insulation and were provided to Nibe (R<Think application).
time_representativeness: Manufacturer specific data for the location Tiel have been collected for the year 2019.
geographical_representativeness: The data used for the LCA are specific for this product which is manufactured by a single manufacturer in a single production site. Different types of Kooltherm® insulation boards are produced at the production plant in Tiel (NL).
technology_representativeness: The data used for the LCA are specific for this product which is manufactured by a single manufacturer in a single production site.
impact_assessment: The characterization factors from EC-JRC were applied. No additional or deviating characterization factors were used.
additional_paragraphs: The total mass of biogenic carbon containing materials is less than 5 % of the total mass of the product and accompanying packaging.
Carbon offsetting is not allowed in the EN 15804 and hence not taken into account in the calculations.

All electricity used during production comes from renewable sources. By generating energy on-site with PV panels and with procured energy from fully certified renewable sources (Guarantees of Origin).

subsections.title: Software
subsections.content: For the calculation of the LCA results, the software program SimaPro 9.1.1 has been used.

subsections.title: Information on allocation
subsections.content: Different types of Kooltherm® insulation boards are produced at the production plant in Tiel (NL). For the use of energy there is only data available for the total site. This data has been allocated to Kooltherm® K12 based on physical properties. Production waste was allocated similarly.

subsections.title: Informatie on cut off
subsections.content: The total of neglected input flows per module is less than 5% of energy usage and mass as prescribed by EN15804+A2.

subsections.title: Information on excluded processes
subsections.content: Following processes were excluded for the inventory: - Impact of infrastructures - Consumables necessary for the functioning of the process, production, maintenance and end-of-life of equipment - Environmental impacts caused by the personnel of the production plants are not included in the LCA, e.g. waste from the cafeteria and sanitary installations or environmental effects caused by commuter traffic. Heating or cooling of the plants in order to ensure a comfortable indoor climate for the personnel could not be distinguished during the data collection and is therefore included.

subsections.title: Information on biogenic carbon modelling
subsections.content: The total mass of biogenic carbon containing materials is less than 5 % of the total mass of the product and accompanying packaging.

subsections.title: Information on carbon offsetting
subsections.content: Carbon offsetting is not allowed in the EN 15804 and hence not taken into account in the calculations.

subsections.title: Additional or deviating characterization factors
subsections.content: The characterization factors from EC-JRC were applied. No additional or deviating characterization factors were used.

subsections.title: Description of the variability
subsections.content: The declared unit in this EPD is 1 m2 thermal insulation with a thickness of 80 mm which gives a RD-value of 3,80 m2·K/W. Kingspan Kooltherm® K12 can be produced in all thicknesses between 20 and 200mm (single layer product) and covers a RD range of 0.95 – 9.50. The results in this EPD can be used to recalculate to other thicknesses / RD-values. Where the foam-core is the scalable part and the facer the non-scalable part.

subsections.title: Specificity
subsections.content: The data used for the LCA are specific for this product which is manufactured by a single manufacturer in a single production site.

subsections.title: Period of data collection
subsections.content: Manufacturer specific data for the location Tiel have been collected for the year 2019.

subsections.title: Information on data collection
subsections.content: Company specific data for the product stage have been collected by Kingspan Insulation and were provided to Nibe (R<Think application).

subsections.title: Database used for background data
subsections.content: The Ecoinvent v3.6 database (2019) is used for background data

subsections.title: Energy mix
subsections.content: All electricity used during production comes from renewable sources. By generating energy on-site with PV panels and with procured energy from fully certified renewable sources (Guarantees of Origin).
